proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_cetuximab=1 have longer mean pfs_months than those with treatment_cetuximab=0.
Patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab=1 have longer mean pfs_months than those with treatment_bevacizumab=0.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=1 have longer mean pfs_months than those with treatment_pembrolizumab=0.
Patients receiving treatment_encorafenib=1 have longer mean pfs_months than those with treatment_encorafenib=0.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 have longer mean pfs_months than those with treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=0.
Patients receiving treatment_regorafenib=1 have longer mean pfs_months than those with treatment_regorafenib=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS = 4.285 on treatment_cetuximab vs 4.323 off (delta=-0.038; n_treat=15078, n_ctrl=34922; t=-1.71, p=8.801e-02).
Mean PFS = 4.301 on treatment_bevacizumab vs 4.320 off (delta=-0.019; n_treat=22383, n_ctrl=27617; t=-0.93, p=3.544e-01).
Mean PFS = 4.316 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 4.311 off (delta=+0.005; n_treat=7660, n_ctrl=42340; t=0.18, p=8.557e-01).
Mean PFS = 4.316 on treatment_encorafenib vs 4.311 off (delta=+0.005; n_treat=5111, n_ctrl=44889; t=0.16, p=8.725e-01).
Mean PFS = 4.271 on treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib vs 4.315 off (delta=-0.044; n_treat=4033, n_ctrl=45967; t=-1.17, p=2.435e-01).
Mean PFS = 5.089 on treatment_regorafenib vs 4.117 off (delta=+0.972; n_treat=10022, n_ctrl=39978; t=32.02, p=1.709e-216).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with kras_mutation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with kras_mutation=0.
Patients with nras_mutation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with nras_mutation=0.
Patients with braf_v600e=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with braf_v600e=0.
Patients with msi_high=1 have longer mean pfs_months than those with msi_high=0.
Patients with her2_amplified=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with her2_amplified=0.
Patients with ntrk_fusion=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with ntrk_fusion=0.
Patients with right_sided_primary=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with right_sided_primary=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS = 4.121 (kras_mutation=1, n=20898) vs 4.448 (kras_mutation=0, n=29102); delta=-0.327; t=-16.14, p=1.862e-58.
Mean PFS = 4.526 (nras_mutation=1, n=1506) vs 4.305 (nras_mutation=0, n=48494); delta=+0.221; t=3.38, p=7.312e-04.
Mean PFS = 4.258 (her2_amplified=1, n=1504) vs 4.313 (her2_amplified=0, n=48496); delta=-0.056; t=-0.91, p=3.603e-01.
Mean PFS = 4.351 (ntrk_fusion=1, n=251) vs 4.311 (ntrk_fusion=0, n=49749); delta=+0.040; t=0.27, p=7.862e-01.
Mean PFS = 4.114 (right_sided_primary=1, n=17657) vs 4.419 (right_sided_primary=0, n=32343); delta=-0.305; t=-14.84, p=1.044e-49.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps (worse performance status) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Stage IV (stage_iv=1) patients have shorter mean pfs_months than non-stage-IV.
Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Female patients (sex_female=1) have different mean pfs_months than male patients.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r=-0.352 (slope=-1.190 mo per unit ECOG), p=0.000e+00.
Stage IV mean PFS=3.703 vs non-IV 5.055; delta=-1.352; p=0.000e+00.
Female mean PFS=4.308 vs male 4.314; delta=-0.006; p=7.703e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher nlr is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

The PFS benefit of treatment_cetuximab over no cetuximab is larger in KRAS-wild-type (kras_mutation=0) than in KRAS-mutant patients (i.e., a positive treatment_cetuximab x (1-kras_mutation) interaction).
The PFS benefit of treatment_cetuximab is larger in left-sided primary tumors (right_sided_primary=0) than in right-sided.
The PFS benefit of treatment_cetuximab is larger in NRAS-wild-type than NRAS-mutant patients (negative treatment_cetuximab x nras_mutation interaction).
The PFS benefit of treatment_cetuximab is larger in BRAF V600E wild-type than in BRAF V600E mutant patients (negative treatment_cetuximab x braf_v600e interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab effect in KRAS-WT=-0.048 mo, in KRAS-mut=-0.028 mo; interaction beta=+0.020, p=6.649e-01. (Note: positive interaction means cetuximab effect is *larger* in KRAS-mut; negative means larger in KRAS-WT — consistent with hypothesis if negative.)
treatment_cetuximab x right_sided_primary interaction beta=+0.026, p=5.834e-01. Negative beta indicates cetuximab effect is *smaller* in right-sided (consistent with hypothesis).
treatment_cetuximab x nras_mutation interaction beta=-0.007, p=9.596e-01.
treatment_cetuximab x braf_v600e interaction beta=-0.026, p=8.051e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The PFS benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab is larger in MSI-high (msi_high=1) than in MSI-stable patients (positive treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high interaction).
Within MSI-high patients, mean pfs_months is higher among those receiving treatment_pembrolizumab than those not.
Within MSI-stable (msi_high=0) patients, mean pfs_months among those receiving treatment_pembrolizumab does not differ meaningfully from those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Pembro effect in MSS=+0.005 mo; in MSI-H=+0.007 mo; interaction beta=+0.002, p=9.879e-01.
In MSI-H (n=2513): mean PFS treated=4.299 vs untreated=4.292; delta=+0.007; p=9.568e-01.
In MSS: mean PFS treated=4.317 vs untreated=4.312; delta=+0.005; p=8.610e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The PFS benefit of treatment_encorafenib is larger in BRAF V600E mutant (braf_v600e=1) than in wild-type patients (positive treatment_encorafenib x braf_v600e interaction).
Within BRAF V600E mutant patients, mean pfs_months is higher among those receiving treatment_encorafenib than those not.

analyses.result_summary: Encorafenib effect in BRAF-WT=+0.013 mo; in BRAF-V600E=-0.129 mo; interaction beta=-0.141, p=3.762e-01.
In BRAF-V600E: mean PFS treated=3.979 vs untreated=4.108; delta=-0.129; p=3.291e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The PFS benefit of treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is larger in HER2-amplified (her2_amplified=1) than non-amplified patients.
Within HER2-amplified patients, mean pfs_months is higher among those receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib than those not.

analyses.result_summary: T/T effect in HER2-neg=-0.046 mo; in HER2-amp=+0.017 mo; interaction beta=+0.063, p=7.778e-01.
In HER2-amp: mean PFS treated=4.273 vs untreated=4.256; delta=+0.017; p=9.344e-01.

Patients with rural_residence=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than urban-residence patients.
Higher education_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Mean pfs_months differs by race_ethnicity category (omnibus F-test).
Mean pfs_months differs by insurance_type category (omnibus F-test).

analyses.result_summary: rural mean=4.331 vs urban 4.307; delta=+0.024, p=3.388e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among the panel of common pharmacogenomic SNPs, at least one SNP shows a statistically significant association with pfs_months.
Higher snp_rs1050828 dosage is associated with longer mean pfs_months.
Higher snp_rs1801131 dosage is associated with shorter mean pfs_months.
Higher snp_rs1801197 dosage is associated with shorter mean pfs_months.

Higher snp_rs429358 dosage is associated with shorter mean pfs_months.

analyses.code: for c in snp_cols: pearsonr(df[c], df.pfs_months)

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable OLS model on pfs_months including clinical, biomarker, and treatment covariates, ecog_ps and albumin_g_dl remain independently prognostic (lower ECOG and higher albumin associated with longer PFS).
After adjustment for clinical and biomarker covariates, treatment_cetuximab retains a negative association with pfs_months (signed coefficient).
After adjustment for clinical and biomarker covariates, treatment_bevacizumab retains a positive association with pfs_months (signed coefficient).
After adjustment for clinical and biomarker covariates, treatment_pembrolizumab retains a positive association with pfs_months (signed coefficient).
After adjustment for clinical and biomarker covariates, treatment_encorafenib retains a positive association with pfs_months (signed coefficient).
After adjustment for clinical and biomarker covariates, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib retains a positive association with pfs_months (signed coefficient).
After adjustment for clinical and biomarker covariates, treatment_regorafenib retains a positive association with pfs_months (signed coefficient).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted ecog_ps beta=-1.171 (p=0.00e+00); albumin beta=+0.469 (p=0.00e+00); model R^2=0.859.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The cetuximab benefit is largest in left-sided KRAS-wild-type patients; modeled as a treatment_cetuximab x kras_mutation x right_sided_primary three-way interaction with the strongest deficit (most negative effect) when cetuximab is given to right-sided KRAS-mutant tumors.
Pembrolizumab benefit in MSI-high is preserved across stage groups (no treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high x stage_iv 3-way interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab effect: L-WT=-0.065, L-MUT=-0.036, R-WT=-0.031, R-MUT=-0.014; 3-way interaction beta=-0.012, p=9.007e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The PFS effect of treatment_bevacizumab differs between stage IV and non-stage-IV patients (treatment_bevacizumab x stage_iv interaction).
The PFS effect of treatment_cetuximab differs between stage IV and non-stage-IV patients (treatment_cetuximab x stage_iv interaction).
The PFS effect of treatment_regorafenib differs between stage IV and non-stage-IV patients (treatment_regorafenib x stage_iv interaction).

analyses.result_summary: treatment_bevacizumab effect: non-IV=-0.015 mo, IV=-0.019 mo; interaction beta=-0.004, p=9.285e-01.
treatment_cetuximab effect: non-IV=-0.056 mo, IV=-0.027 mo; interaction beta=+0.029, p=4.968e-01.
treatment_regorafenib effect: non-IV=+0.941 mo, IV=+1.011 mo; interaction beta=+0.070, p=1.510e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with tp53_mutation=0.
Patients with pik3ca_mutation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with pik3ca_mutation=0.
Patients with pten_loss=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with pten_loss=0.
Patients with cdkn2a_loss=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with cdkn2a_loss=0.
Patients with her2_amplification=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with her2_amplification=0.
Patients with fgfr_alteration=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with fgfr_alteration=0.
Within KRAS-wild-type (kras_mutation=0) patients, mean pfs_months is higher among those receiving treatment_cetuximab than those not.
Within KRAS-mutant (kras_mutation=1) patients, mean pfs_months in cetuximab-treated patients is similar to or worse than in untreated.

Within RAS/RAF wild-type left-sided (kras_mutation=0 & nras_mutation=0 & braf_v600e=0 & right_sided_primary=0) patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer mean pfs_months than no cetuximab.

analyses.result_summary: In KRAS-WT (n=29102): mean PFS treated=4.415 vs untreated=4.463; delta=-0.048; p=1.215e-01.
In KRAS-mut (n=20898): mean PFS treated=4.102 vs untreated=4.130; delta=-0.028; p=3.755e-01.
In LS-RAS/RAF-WT (n=16443): treated mean=4.617 vs untreated=4.684; delta=-0.067; p=1.246e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The detrimental effect of higher ecog_ps on pfs_months is amplified at low albumin_g_dl (negative interaction beta in pfs_months ~ ecog_ps * albumin_g_dl model implying steeper ECOG slope when albumin is low).
A composite of low albumin_g_dl and high cea_ng_ml (above-median CEA AND below-median albumin) identifies a subgroup with markedly shorter mean pfs_months than the rest of the cohort.

analyses.result_summary: ecog_ps:albumin_g_dl interaction beta=-0.005, p=8.636e-01. Positive interaction implies ECOG penalty smaller at high albumin (consistent with hypothesis).
Composite high-CEA/low-albumin (n=11433) mean PFS=3.960 vs rest (n=38567) 4.416; delta=-0.456, p=1.926e-87.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab effect on pfs_months is significantly negative (or null) in RAS/RAF-mutant (kras_mutation OR nras_mutation OR braf_v600e =1) patients, indicating no benefit or harm from cetuximab in this group.
Within RAS/RAF wild-type patients (kras_mutation=0 AND nras_mutation=0 AND braf_v600e=0), treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: In RAS/RAF-mut (n=24676): treated mean=4.120 vs untreated=4.154; delta=-0.034, p=2.515e-01.
In RAS/RAF-WT (n=25324): treated=4.444 vs untreated=4.489; delta=-0.045, p=1.704e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Bevacizumab (treatment_bevacizumab) PFS effect differs between right-sided primary (col=right_sided_primary=1) and the complement (interaction term).
Bevacizumab (treatment_bevacizumab) PFS effect differs between KRAS mutant (col=kras_mutation=1) and the complement (interaction term).
Bevacizumab (treatment_bevacizumab) PFS effect differs between with liver metastases (col=liver_mets=1) and the complement (interaction term).

analyses.result_summary: Bev effect when right_sided_primary=0: -0.012; when =1: -0.034; interaction beta=-0.022, p=6.081e-01.
Bev effect when kras_mutation=0: -0.015; when =1: -0.020; interaction beta=-0.004, p=9.151e-01.
Bev effect when liver_mets=0: -0.020; when =1: -0.017; interaction beta=+0.002, p=9.661e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity groups even after adjustment for ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, cea_ng_ml, msi_high, and treatments (omnibus F).
Among insurance_type categories, uninsured/Medicaid patients have shorter mean pfs_months than privately insured even after adjustment for ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, cea_ng_ml.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted ANOVA F on race_ethnicity = 1.21, p=3.035e-01.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS on insurance_type vs private ref
analyses.result_summary: vs private — uninsured beta=-0.089 (p=5.95e-02); medicaid beta=-0.031 (p=2.71e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with prior_chemotherapy=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with prior_chemotherapy=0.
Patients with prior_radiation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with prior_radiation=0.
Patients with prior_surgery=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with prior_surgery=0.
Patients with prior_immunotherapy=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with prior_immunotherapy=0.
Patients with prior_targeted_therapy=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those with prior_targeted_therapy=0.
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
In a fully adjusted multivariable OLS, the treatment_cetuximab:kras_mutation interaction is statistically significant with the expected sign (negative).
In a fully adjusted multivariable OLS, the treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high interaction is statistically significant with the expected sign (positive).
In a fully adjusted multivariable OLS, the treatment_encorafenib:braf_v600e interaction is statistically significant with the expected sign (positive).
In a fully adjusted multivariable OLS, the treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib:her2_amplified interaction is statistically significant with the expected sign (positive).

analyses.code: fully adjusted OLS with treatment-biomarker interactions
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction beta for treatment_cetuximab:kras_mutation = +0.018, p=2.941e-01.

analyses.code: fully adjusted OLS with treatment-biomarker interactions
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction beta for treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high = +0.059, p=2.253e-01.

analyses.code: fully adjusted OLS with treatment-biomarker interactions
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction beta for treatment_encorafenib:braf_v600e = -0.018, p=7.674e-01.

analyses.code: fully adjusted OLS with treatment-biomarker interactions

proposed_hypotheses.text: Stratified verification: among MSI-high patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab, mean pfs_months exceeds 6 months and is at least 2 months greater than MSI-high not receiving pembrolizumab.
Among BRAF V600E mutant patients, encorafenib-treated patients have at least 1 month longer mean pfs_months than not-treated.
Among HER2-amplified patients, trastuzumab/tucatinib-treated patients have longer mean pfs_months than not-treated.
A linear PFS model combining major prognostic and treatment-biomarker interaction terms explains a non-trivial share of pfs_months variance (adjusted R^2 > 0.05).

analyses.code: stratified MSI-high pembro vs no pembro
analyses.result_summary: MSI-H+pembro mean=4.299 (n=396) vs MSI-H no-pembro mean=4.292 (n=2117); delta=+0.007, p=9.568e-01.
BRAF+enc mean=3.979 (n=242) vs BRAF no-enc 4.108 (n=2030); delta=-0.129, p=3.291e-01.
Adjusted R^2 of full interaction model = 0.8586; F-stat p-value=0.000e+00.
